description: Machine-readable inventory of all project-bootstrap components — describes what a generated project receives

frameworks.name: coherence-system.md
frameworks.description: Registry-based stale reference detection for markdown files using pure shell.

frameworks.name: correction-protocol.md
frameworks.description: Mandatory hook-enforced gate that forces lesson logging before diagnosing or fixing any correction.

frameworks.name: delegation.md
frameworks.description: Six-tier model for assigning tasks to the right model tier with escalation and failure protocols.

frameworks.name: development-discipline.md
frameworks.description: TDD iron law and debugging discipline rules adapted from Superpowers plugin.

frameworks.name: falsification.md
frameworks.description: Scientific method for code: prove correctness by failing to disprove, not by hoping things work.

frameworks.name: loopback-system.md
frameworks.description: Parallel backward-fix track for handling defects discovered in earlier phases without blocking forward progress.

frameworks.name: phase-gates.md
frameworks.description: GO/CONFIRM/STOP verdict system for phase transitions and pre-task checks.

frameworks.name: quality-gates.md
frameworks.description: Automated code quality gates including lint, type check, SAST, and secrets scanning.

frameworks.name: session-protocol.md
frameworks.description: Mandatory session start orientation, model self-report gate, and lesson extraction protocol.

frameworks.name: visual-verification.md
frameworks.description: Playwright-based visual verification pipeline for tasks tagged needs_browser=1.

hooks.name: .semgrepignore.template
hooks.description: Semgrep ignore patterns deployed to bootstrapped projects to suppress false positives.

hooks.name: agent-spawn-gate.template.sh
hooks.description: Hard enforcement gate for Agent tool calls — blocks sub-agent spawns when delegation approval or pre-task check is stale.

hooks.name: check-pbxproj.template.sh
hooks.description: After Write tool calls on .swift files, warns if the file is missing from the Xcode project.pbxproj.

hooks.name: correction-detector.template.sh
hooks.description: Scans every user message for correction signals and injects a hard gate reminder before Claude responds.

hooks.name: end-of-turn-check.template.sh
hooks.description: Fires after Claude finishes responding to check for session hygiene issues and inject warnings.

hooks.name: escalation-tracker.template.sh
hooks.description: After sub-agent completion, detects failures and increments per-tier failure counters for escalation tracking.

hooks.name: framework-contamination-check.template.sh
hooks.description: After Edit or Write calls on framework files, scans for project-specific strings that violate framework genericity.

hooks.name: framework-contamination-patterns.template.conf
hooks.description: Configuration file listing project-specific patterns that must not appear in generic framework files.

hooks.name: generate-protected-files.template.sh
hooks.description: Auto-generates protected-files.conf from project STOP rules, infrastructure scripts, and framework files.

hooks.name: lib-fire-counter.template.sh
hooks.description: Append-only JSONL telemetry library sourced by hooks to track fire counts per hook name.

hooks.name: lib-scope-counter.template.sh
hooks.description: Scope tracker library replacing the EDIT_COUNT heuristic — per-file sha1 dedup, thresholded advisory, concurrency-hardened via flock + atomic rename.

hooks.name: mark_delegation_approved.template.sh
hooks.description: Resets the delegation edit counter and records a fresh approval timestamp after Master approves a delegation table.

hooks.name: mark_plan_active.template.sh
hooks.description: Creates .active-plan marker to suppress scope-counter advisory for 6h during deliberate multi-file implementation.

hooks.name: mark_plan_done.template.sh
hooks.description: Clears .active-plan marker when the plan's deliberate multi-file implementation phase ends.

hooks.name: permission-denied-tracker.template.sh
hooks.description: When a sub-agent Bash call is denied, increments the failure counter for the active sub-agent tier.

hooks.name: post-compact-recovery.template.sh
hooks.description: After context compaction, re-injects critical behavioral rules that may have been summarized away.

hooks.name: post-tool-check.template.sh
hooks.description: Consolidated PostToolUse router dispatching to framework-contamination-check, README drift detection, and commit nudge.

hooks.name: pre-edit-check.template.sh
hooks.description: Consolidated gate for Edit/Write calls combining delegation reminder and architecture file protection.

hooks.name: pre-tool-gate.template.sh
hooks.description: Consolidated PreToolUse router dispatching Edit/Write/MultiEdit to pre-edit-check, Bash to protect-databases, Agent to agent-spawn-gate.

hooks.name: protect-databases.template.sh
hooks.description: Fires before Bash commands to deny sqlite3 write operations targeting external project databases.

hooks.name: protected-files.template.conf
hooks.description: Configuration file listing filename patterns for architecture files that require human confirmation to edit.

hooks.name: session-end-safety.template.sh
hooks.description: At session termination, auto-saves session state to NEXT_SESSION.md if no manual save was done recently.

hooks.name: session-start-check.template.sh
hooks.description: At session start, runs the full briefing and injects DB state, NEXT_SESSION.md, and health checks as additionalContext.

hooks.name: show-fire-rates.template.sh
hooks.description: Analysis tool that reads .fire-counts.jsonl and prints per-hook fire rates plus dead-hook list.

hooks.name: static-analysis-gate.template.sh
hooks.description: After Edit and Write calls, runs Semgrep on the modified file and reports findings as non-blocking advisories.

hooks.name: subagent-delegation-check.template.sh
hooks.description: When a sub-agent is spawned, verifies that delegation was recently approved and injects an advisory warning.

scripts.name: bootstrap_project.sh
scripts.description: Main bootstrapper — creates a new project with the full workflow engine from templates.

scripts.name: build_plugin.sh
scripts.description: Builds and optionally installs the Cowork Claude plugin from plugin.json and associated assets. Meta-project only.

scripts.name: build_summarizer.sh
scripts.description: Bootstrap meta-project build summarizer wrapping build, test, and clean steps. Meta-project only; generated projects get build_summarizer.template.sh.

scripts.name: check_all_projects.sh
scripts.description: Runs deployment verification and eval scoring across all active projects listed in PROJECTS.local.md. Meta-project only.

scripts.name: db_queries.sh
scripts.description: Thin wrapper delegating all db_queries commands to the Python dbq CLI. Meta-project instance; generated projects get db_queries.template.sh deployed as db_queries.sh.

scripts.name: mark_delegation_approved.sh
scripts.description: Meta-project root wrapper delegating to .claude/hooks/mark_delegation_approved.sh. Meta-project only.

scripts.name: save_session.sh
scripts.description: Snapshots DB state and updates NEXT_SESSION.md for session handoff. Meta-project instance; generated projects get save_session.template.sh deployed as save_session.sh.

scripts.name: session_briefing.sh
scripts.description: Compact status digest at session start. Meta-project instance; generated projects get session_briefing.template.sh deployed as session_briefing.sh.

scripts.name: work.sh
scripts.description: Work session launcher that sets environment variables and opens the Claude Code session. Meta-project instance; generated projects get work.template.sh deployed as work.sh.

scripts.name: build_summarizer.template.sh
scripts.description: Template for project build summarizer — wraps build, test, and SAST steps into a compact digest.

scripts.name: build_summarizer_xcode.template.sh
scripts.description: Template for Xcode build summarizer — wraps xcodebuild and returns a compact digest for Claude.

scripts.name: coherence_check.template.sh
scripts.description: Template for scanning markdown files for deprecated patterns defined in the coherence registry.

scripts.name: coherence_registry.template.sh
scripts.description: Template defining deprecated pattern arrays sourced by coherence_check.sh for stale reference detection.

scripts.name: db_queries.template.sh
scripts.description: Template for thin Python CLI dispatcher with bash fallback for all db_queries commands.

scripts.name: fix.template.sh
scripts.description: Template for fix mode session launcher using osascript on macOS.

scripts.name: generate_board.template.py
scripts.description: Template for markdown task board generator grouped by phase from the project SQLite database.

scripts.name: harvest.template.sh
scripts.description: Template for scanning project lessons for patterns eligible for promotion to LESSONS_UNIVERSAL.md.

scripts.name: milestone_check.template.sh
scripts.description: Template for merge-readiness gate checking dev-to-main promotion criteria.

scripts.name: pre-commit.template.sh
scripts.description: Template for pre-commit hook running Gate 1 quality checks: lint, type check, SAST, and secrets.

scripts.name: save_session.template.sh
scripts.description: Template for generating NEXT_SESSION.md from current DB and git state at session end.

scripts.name: session_briefing.template.sh
scripts.description: Template for compact session start status digest with signal, phase, and task queue.

scripts.name: shared_signal.template.sh
scripts.description: Template for computing session signal (GREEN/YELLOW/RED) from DB state — sourced by session_briefing.sh.

scripts.name: test_protocol.template.sh
scripts.description: Template for validating session_briefing.sh and db_queries.sh signal output against known database states.

scripts.name: work.template.sh
scripts.description: Template for work session launcher setting project environment variables.

scripts.name: fill_placeholders.py
scripts.description: CLI entry point for placeholder token replacement — orchestrates fp_engine, fp_registry, and fp_replacer.

scripts.name: fp_engine.py
scripts.description: Derivation engine for fill_placeholders — contains SpecReader, TechDetector, and build_values() with 41 token derivations.

scripts.name: fp_registry.py
scripts.description: Token registry defining the 41 placeholder token definitions used by fill_placeholders.

scripts.name: fp_replacer.py
scripts.description: Placeholder substitution engine applying regex replacements to files and generating the JSON report.

scripts.name: verify_deployment.py
scripts.description: Runs 18 deployment verification checks (C01-C18) for bootstrapped projects and reports pass/fail.

agents.name: explorer.template.md
agents.description: Read-only research agent for P1-DISCOVER tasks, codebase exploration, and pre-implementation context gathering.

agents.name: implementer.template.md
agents.description: Multi-file feature implementation agent for Sonnet-tier tasks — new views, models, managers, and multi-file features.

agents.name: verifier.template.md
agents.description: Post-implementation review agent that reads changes, runs tests, and reports PASS/FAIL with evidence.

agents.name: worker.template.md
agents.description: Single-file config and boilerplate agent for Haiku-tier work — keyboard shortcuts, simple models, plist entries.

checks.description: Runs db_queries.sh health and verifies it exits 0.
Runs db_queries.sh next and verifies the task queue is accessible.
Runs session_briefing.sh and verifies it exits 0.
Runs coherence_check.sh and verifies no stale references are detected.
Verifies all @-import references in CLAUDE.md resolve to existing files.
Scans project files for unfilled %%PLACEHOLDER%% tokens that were not replaced after bootstrapping.
Verifies every hook command referenced in settings.json resolves to an existing, executable script.
Verifies all 10 framework files are present in the project-local frameworks directory (templates/frameworks/ source, deployed to .claude/frameworks/).
Verifies required tracking files (LESSONS, LEARNING_LOG, PROJECT_MEMORY, AGENT_DELEGATION) are present.
Verifies the refs/ directory exists and is scaffolded.
Runs build_summarizer.sh build and verifies the build command succeeds.
Verifies LESSONS_UNIVERSAL.md exists for cross-project lesson storage (located at ~/.claude/LESSONS_UNIVERSAL.md by convention; created as a stub if absent).
Verifies the minimum number of executable hook scripts are deployed in .claude/hooks/.
Verifies .claude/settings.json is valid JSON with the minimum number of hook events wired.
Verifies implementer and worker custom agent directories exist with at least one .md file each.
Verifies the .claude/rules/ directory is scaffolded for path-specific rule injection.
Scans templates for hardcoded project-specific references that should not appear in generic templates.
Runs db_queries.sh drift --quiet and verifies the drift detection score is above threshold (>= 80).

rules.name: AGENT_DELEGATION_TEMPLATE.md
rules.description: Template for the agent delegation logic file — tier model, task mapping, and failure escalation protocol.

rules.name: CLAUDE_TEMPLATE.md
rules.description: Template for the project CLAUDE.md entry point with framework imports and quick reference.

rules.name: ROUTER_TEMPLATE.md
rules.description: Template for the context router table mapping on-demand frameworks and project context files.

rules.name: RULES_EXTENDED_TEMPLATE.md
rules.description: Template for the extended rules reference covering blocker detection, merge gate, and code standards.

rules.name: RULES_TEMPLATE.md
rules.description: Template for project-specific rules including phase gates, task workflow, and tech stack configuration.

rules.name: database-safety.template.md
rules.description: Path-scoped rules for database access — read-only project DBs, GRDB only, no raw sqlite3 calls.

rules.name: go-standards.template.md
rules.description: Path-scoped Go coding standards applied to all .go files in the project.

rules.name: node-standards.template.md
rules.description: Path-scoped Node.js and TypeScript coding standards applied to .ts and .tsx files.

rules.name: python-standards.template.md
rules.description: Path-scoped Python coding standards applied to all .py files in the project.

rules.name: rust-standards.template.md
rules.description: Path-scoped Rust coding standards applied to all .rs files in the project.

rules.name: swift-standards.template.md
rules.description: Path-scoped Swift coding standards applied to all .swift files in the project.

rules.name: workflow-scripts.template.md
rules.description: Path-scoped rules for shell scripts and framework docs covering error handling and cascading changes.

settings.name: settings.local.template.json
settings.description: Template for local-only Claude Code permissions overrides not committed to the repository.

settings.name: settings.template.json
settings.description: Template for the main Claude Code settings.json wiring all hooks to their event types with permissions.

dbq_commands.name: delegation.py
dbq_commands.description: Delegation, delegation-md, and sync-check commands for task tier mapping and AGENT_DELEGATION.md regeneration.

dbq_commands.name: drift.py
dbq_commands.description: Drift detection with unified coherence checking and 0-100 scored report across C1-C10 checkers.

dbq_commands.name: eval.py
dbq_commands.description: Three-layer evaluation scoring: deployment quality (D1-D8), process health (P1-P7), and improvement velocity (V1-V4).

dbq_commands.name: falsification.py
dbq_commands.description: Assumption tracking and verification commands: assume, verify-assumption, verify-all, and assumptions.

dbq_commands.name: handover.py
dbq_commands.description: Session continuity commands: resume (single-command startup) and handover (annotate task with session notes).

dbq_commands.name: health.py
dbq_commands.description: Health and recovery commands: init-db, health, backup, restore, and verify.

dbq_commands.name: knowledge.py
dbq_commands.description: Knowledge commands: lessons, log-lesson, promote, escalate, and harvest for lesson pipeline management.

dbq_commands.name: lint.py
dbq_commands.description: Structural lint checks for project configuration files.

dbq_commands.name: loopbacks.py
dbq_commands.description: Loopback management commands: loopbacks, loopback-stats, loopback-lesson, and ack-breaker.

dbq_commands.name: next_cmd.py
dbq_commands.description: Next command outputting task queue with circuit breaker, loopbacks, forward-ready, blocked tasks, and stale blockers.

dbq_commands.name: phases.py
dbq_commands.description: Phase and gate commands: phase, gate, gate-pass, status, blockers, confirm, confirmations, and master.

dbq_commands.name: sessions.py
dbq_commands.description: Session and decision commands: sessions, log, decisions, tag-session, session-tags, and session-file.

dbq_commands.name: snapshots.py
dbq_commands.description: Snapshot commands: snapshot, snapshot-list, snapshot-show, and snapshot-diff within the db_snapshots table.

dbq_commands.name: tasks.py
dbq_commands.description: Task commands: done, quick, check, and supporting utilities for task lifecycle management.

dbq_commands.name: upgrade_drift.py
dbq_commands.description: Drift detection against bootstrap provenance: reads .bootstrap_profile/.bootstrap_created and reports missing template-derived files.

dbq_commands.name: upgrade_drift_settings.py
dbq_commands.description: Three-way merge (BASE/OURS/THEIRS) for settings.json migration. Modes: --dry-run, --apply (refuses on conflicts), --emit-patch. Plus rollback-settings from .pre-v1.3 backup.

dbq_commands.name: doctor.py
dbq_commands.description: Environment health check: prerequisites, templates, frameworks, platform notes, and host capabilities.
